message:
The other day, I was chatting with a friend about our smoke alarm setups, and I couldn’t help but feel a bit smug. You see, I had just updated ours to include a carbon monoxide detector as well. My friend chuckled and said, "You’re over-preparing!" Well, just a week later, her smoke alarm went off while she was cooking dinner. Thankfully, it was just a little bit of smoke from the pan, but it reminded me how important it is to have a plan. 

That night, we sat down and mapped out a quick escape route from her kitchen to the front door — a little prep goes a long way! It felt good to share my little ‘I told you so’ moment while helping her be more prepared. 

Have you ever had a similar experience where being prepared paid off? This little refresher helped me out, too!
